away.starter_source: live ESPN roster/stat/injury APIs; starters inferred by live minutes + production

players.name: Monique Akoa Makani
players.injury_comment: This will be Akoa Makani's second straight game on the sidelines, which could result in another start for Alexa Held. Akoa Makani's next chance to play will come Wednesday in a rematch with the Fever.

players.name: Jovana Nogic
players.injury_comment: According to Hayden Cilley of ClutchPoints.com, head coach Nate Tibbetts said pregame that Nogic is not with the team for personal reasons. She can be considered out indefinitely until the Mercury offer another update. With Nogic unavailable, Alexa Held is likely to see increased playing time moving forward.

players.name: Sami Whitcomb
players.injury_comment: This is a tough blow for Whitcomb and the Mercury as she will now miss the first month or so of the WNBA season. Whitcomb served as a part-time starter during her first season in Phoenix last year, averaging 9.1 points, 2.6 rebounds and 2.5 assists in 23.9 minutes per game across 43 regular-season appearances (20 starts). Kiana Williams could see an uptick in minutes with this news.

home.starter_source: live ESPN roster/stat/injury APIs; starters inferred by live minutes + production

players.name: Caitlin Clark
players.injury_comment: Clark continues to land on the injury report with a lingering back issue, though she hasn't missed a game since May 20. The star guard has reached the 20-point mark in five consecutive contests, averaging 26.0 points, 8.6 assists and 4.0 rebounds across 34.6 minutes per game during that span.
